dialogs.script:
showimage: squirtle
say: Squirtle!
say: The Tiny Turtle Pokemon. A Water type.
say: It shelters itself in its shell when in danger!
choice: Do you want to choose Squirtle?
setflag: starter_pending_squirtle
clearflag: starter_pending_bulbasaur
clearflag: starter_pending_charmander
say: Great choice! Talk to Prof. Oak to confirm!
lines: The Tiny Turtle Pokemon. A Water type.
It shelters itself in its shell when in danger!
Great choice! Talk to Prof. Oak to confirm!

dialogs.script:
